title.es: Telemetría de tu compañía – Reporte técnico

description.en: Build a technical/operational Pandas pipeline over telemetry_events: at least three metric functions (volume, errors, latency — not business KPIs), load SQL → refine Pandas → datetime → groupby → aggregate, GET /telemetry/report with period and metrics JSON, 60-second in-memory cache, optional auth_failure_rate and minimal visual dashboard.
description.es: Construye un pipeline técnico/operacional con Pandas sobre telemetry_events: al menos tres funciones de métrica (volumen, errores, latencia — no KPIs de negocio), cargar SQL → refinar Pandas → datetime → groupby → agregar, GET /telemetry/report con JSON de period y metrics, caché en memoria 60s, auth_failure_rate y dashboard visual opcional.

sharing.en: I just completed Company's Telemetry – Technical Report with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/ai-eng-telemetry-report #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #fastapi #pandas #supabase #telemetry
